patch.value: Core read/validate integrity: exact-ID search rank guarantee across modes + parent-hierarchy cycle detection

Two agent-trust correctness bugs surfaced from dogfooding the large (1463-item) 2d-bots tracker: (GH-281) pm search <exact-id> returns the item but in HYBRID/SEMANTIC mode the exact-ID keyword boost (score 1000) is normalized to [0,1] and blended under hybrid_semantic_weight, so a high-semantic body-mention item can out-rank the exact target (keyword-only mode already fixed by #268/d31780c1 + covered by search-command.spec exact-id test); (GH-280) pm validate detects blocked_by/definition_of_ready dependency cycles (Tarjan SCC, #271) but NOT cycles in the parent (composition) graph, so A->parent->B->parent->A silently corrupts hierarchy rendering/orphan analysis/rollups. Bundled because both are core read+validate integrity fixes that determine whether agents can trust pm's primitives. Reuses existing primitives: combineHybridHits/scoreDocument for search, findLifecycleDependencyCycleComponents (generic Tarjan) for the parent graph.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implementation complete (lead verification). Two specialized sub-agents shipped on disjoint files: (pm-oqgf/GH-281) search.ts — exact_id_match flag on SearchHit + forceExactIdHitsToTop() reattaches exact full/short-ID keyword hits in a reserved band above all blended hits at BOTH semantic+hybrid return points (after rerank) + threshold exemption, so the exact target ranks #1 in every mode and is never dropped; full-ID(1000)>short-ID(900) preserved. (pm-8vul/GH-280) validate.ts — buildLifecycleParentGraph (child->parent over ALL items) + detectLifecycleParentCycles reusing the generic Tarjan SCC helper; folded parent_cycle_* into the lifecycle check details + validate_hierarchy_parent_cycle[_error] warnings + --parent-cycle-severity off|warn|error flag (mirrors dependency-cycle policy) + remediation entry. Lead added the register-commands.spec mapping assertion for the new flag (action-wrapper branch coverage). VERIFIED: pnpm typecheck clean; full suite 4536 tests pass; coverage 100/100/100/100 (29079 stmts, 22771 branches); quality:static + contracts:check green. Live sandbox: parent A<->B cycle → validate_hierarchy_parent_cycle:1 (warn, ok:true) / _error:1 (error, ok:false, exit 1), sample path A->B->A, off suppresses, normal hierarchy = 0 false positives, fix-hint surfaces 'pm update <id> --parent <other-id>'; exact-id search still score 1000 #1.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Opened PR #282 (https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/pull/282), Closes #281 + #280. Triggering CodeRabbit/Gemini/Codex review. CI running.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Review round 1: Gemini raised 3 findings, all accepted. (HIGH, validate.ts) buildLifecycleParentGraph used a case-sensitive Set lookup but PR #279 made parent matching case-insensitive — a casing mismatch (parent: PM-FK49 vs id: pm-fk49) would silently drop the edge and hide a parent cycle; fixed with a lowercase->canonical id map + regression assertion (pm-pf parent PM-PA resolves to pm-pa). (MEDIUM, search.ts x2) Math.max(0, ...remaining.map(...)) could stack-overflow on a large pre-truncation candidate set -> switched to reduce; and promoted hits now spread ...hit to preserve matched_all_terms/exact_id_match instead of re-creating the object. CodeRabbit rate-limited (52min); Codex not connected; Sourcery skipped. Full suite 4536 tests, coverage 100/100/100/100, static+contracts green, live re-verified. Re-triggering bots.
